outputs: рҹ”® The code you write today will confuse you tomorrow.
рҹ”® A bug fixed is a feature earned.
рҹ”® Great developers don't write perfect code, they write maintainable code.
рҹ”® Your next project will be your best one yet.
рҹ”® Coffee is the fuel that powers the coding engine.
рҹ”® The best time to refactor was yesterday. The next best time is now.
рҹ”® Documentation is a love letter to your future self.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! рҹҗӣ
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?' рҹҚә
Why do Java developers wear glasses? Because they can't C# рҹ‘“
There are only 10 types of people in the world: those who understand binary and those who don't.
!false - It's funny because it's true. рҹҳ„
A programmer's wife tells him: 'Go to the store and get a loaf of bread. If they have eggs, get a dozen.' He comes home with 12 loaves of bread.
Why did the developer go broke? Because he used up all his cache! рҹ’ё
"First, solve the problem. Then, write the code." - John Johnson
"Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad." - Cory House
"Simplicity is the soul of efficiency." - Austin Freeman
"Make it work, make it right, make it fast." - Kent Beck
"Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand." - Martin Fowler
"The only way to go fast is to go well." - Robert C. Martin
"Programming isn't about what you know; it's about what you can figure out." - Chris Pine
"There is no spoon." рҹҘ„
"Follow the white rabbit." рҹҗ°
"Welcome to the real world."
"I know kung fu." рҹҘӢ
"Free your mind."
"The Matrix has you..."
"What is real? How do you define 'real'?"
